result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 10:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-01' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  -- each owner change counts as a transfer for the previous owner (old_owner)
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  -- agents who appear in any owner assignment in period (old or new) handled >0 cases
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), joined AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM joined
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-01' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  -- each owner change counts as a transfer for the previous owner (old_owner)
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  -- agents who appear in any owner assignment in period (old or new) handled >0 cases
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), joined AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM joined
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-01' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transfers AS (
  -- each owner change counts as a transfer for the previous owner (old_owner)
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  -- agents who appear in any owner assignment in period (old or new) handled >0 cases
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), joined AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM joined
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-01' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    (NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp) AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
    AND NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp < p.end_date::timestamp
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), joined AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM joined
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-01' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    (NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp) AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE (ch.field__c ILIKE 'owner%')
    AND NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp >= p.start_date::timestamp
    AND NULLIF(ch.createddate,'')::timestamp < p.end_date::timestamp
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
), joined AS (
  SELECT h.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count,
         h.cases_handled
  FROM handled h
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM joined
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, cases_handled DESC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
